programme.desc: Pickwick boss Nathan considers a deal on a diamond tennis bracelet, while Dan and Ellie at London Road make offers on a vintage trumpet, a mechanical digger and a gold pocket watch.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Musician Gerry and his manager Kathy live in Warwickshire, but yearn for the sea and they cannot wait to buy a holiday home on the coast. Kathy loves the wild shores of Pembrokeshire in west Wales, while Gerry is inspired by the crystal waters of the Greek island of Zakynthos. Going head to head to find them their dream property is Jasmine Harman in the UK and Jonnie Irwin in Greece. Each has a £200,000 budget to play with and three amazing options to line up.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: White Hart Hotel management team Clarkey and Katie raise the issue of paying for their car park as the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chris Sheppard hosts the final dinner party in Worcestershire, throwing a black-tie-themed evening. He impresses some of his guests with his home-made sweet chilli sauce and potato towers - although Claire Wier finds the presentation pretentious - before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, civil partners Andrew and David serve up a 'ritzy' affair for their guests, but their food gets a mixed reaction. On the second night, hosts Emma and Richard face a grilling over their use of shop-bought ingredients. Meanwhile, Richard and Joey's 'bromance' develops when they feed each other heart-shaped strawberries. Last to host are newlyweds Joey and Hannah, who serve basic wholesome food, but argue over the size of their fishcakes.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is upset by her hippie sister's decision to become a nun, and resolves to prove her new-found faith is just a phase. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra upsets Ray by comparing him to his irritating cousin Gerard, so he sets out to seek reassurance from his family. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Fred Stoller.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to ask Daphne for a date but she misunderstands his intentions, and Frasier has a frustrating episode of his own. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The number of large noses in Rick's family causes concern for Roz as she thinks about what her baby will look like. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two couples to see if they managed to find their perfect property. First, Phil revisits civil partners Jo and Ally, who were house hunting in south London for a home big enough for three. Later, Phil also meets back up with Steve and Jo, who searched for a family home in Cardiff in 2015.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Documentary following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree as they help British people making French castles their home or running businesses from them.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business.(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A freak car accident in Cumbria leaves Richard fighting for his life. In Hampshire, horse rider Pat takes a nasty fall when her animal is spooked. Plus, in a night mission in Suffolk, the medics race to the aid of motorcyclist Nigel who has suffered serious multiple injuries.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Egypt's Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Archaeologists hunt for Queen Cleopatra's lost tomb and dive the Mediterranean to explore the sunken ruins of ancient Alexandria. Another team take a batch of 4,000-year-old mummies to the hospital to scan for hidden treasure and a lawyer-turned-archaeologist discovers a secret tunnel network at a forgotten temple that could lead her to the jackpot - the tomb of the last Pharaoh of Egypt.(n)

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore the Norfolk Broads. This is the first time the couple have visited the area, and they learn about the unique way of life that has developed over the centuries in this network of slow-moving rivers, fens, marshes and waterlogged woodlands. Their trip takes them to a marshman's cottage, the ruins of St Benet's Abbey; and a local Norfolk wherry, and brings to mind events from the book Swallows and Amazons.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows.(n)

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: High Street TV
programme.desc: No Details Available.(n)

programme.title: 3rd Rock from the Sun
programme.desc: Dick tries to rehabilitate a criminal but ends up doing more harm than good, while Harry struggles to write a book report. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Jane Curtin, Kristen Johnston and French Stewart.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A high-school student blacks out during a class field trip. When her condition fails to stabilise and she experiences repeated hallucinations, House suggests using a dangerous method to monitor her brain activity. Taub's private life becomes public knowledge, and Chez Hilson undergoes a makeover.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The hospital is placed in lockdown when a newborn goes missing, prompting staff members to open up to their colleagues in a series of heart-to-hearts that sees Cameron reunited with Chase when she returns to Princeton-Plainsboro. Directed by Hugh Laurie.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Stavros and Emily try to get their house back from squatters, while Margaret attempts to recover the £20,000 she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house. Documentary series in which cameras follow the victims and villains of the buy-to-let boom.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In this special episode, the High Court enforcement agents have to deal with a fraudulent tenant, an evasive debtor and a mother in denial. Steve and Ben are in west London to see a tenant who owes £14,000 in unpaid rent, but when they gain access to the property they discover the house has divided up like a hotel and is being sublet. In Sussex, Brian and Del chase a debt of over £10,000 owed to a van rental business for damaged vehicles, before heading to Kent to try to reclaim £6,000 of unpaid rent from a woman financially dependent on a new partner after a disastrous divorce.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, father-and-son team Del and Dael Anglin face death threats from a debtor's father, after arriving at a property to collect a debt of over £3,500. Meanwhile, in east London, two agents are confronted with a tenant who claims to have had no prior warning that he is being evicted from his tiny bedsit. Del and Brian try to recover £6,000 owed by a London hotel to a catering supply company, and Paul and Steve must tackle a difficult eviction.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. Steve and Phil have to evict a distraught young family from a former high street bank in west London, before paying a call on an elderly tailor in north London.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.sub-title: Can't Pay? My Nightmare Ex Wife
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house.(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Life on the dole in Scotland, including aspiring pop stars Zedd and Saffire, who live in Portobello, Edinburgh and receive £17,000 a year in benefits. After a failed attempt to start her own business in Australia, Kit is back in her home town of Wishaw, North Lanarkshire, to sign on and stay with friends, while Stirling resident Kirsty is desperate for work and is convinced her weight and mild learning disability are stopping her from getting a job. The 30-year-old's stay-at-home parents Rosie and Desmond believe that discrimination is to blame.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A patient suffering from uncontrollable vomiting is admitted, and after making unexpected discoveries about her identity, the team has to delve into her medical history when her condition does not improve. Meanwhile, with Thirteen absent, Chase hires a new member of staff who is made to feel unwelcome, and House has to confront his reservations about his relationship with Cuddy following a visit from his massage therapist.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: When a newborn baby experiences breathing problems and liver failure, the infant's mother is left facing a decision that could affect the child's health as well as her own. House challenges Foreman and Taub to hire a female doctor, and learns a few things about parenting when he looks after Cuddy's daughter. Guest starring Jennifer Grey (Dirty Dancing).(n)

programme.title: Make You Laugh Out Loud
programme.sub-title: Naughty Toddlers Make You Laugh Out Loud
programme.desc: Iain Lee narrates a compilation of amusing clips of toddlers appearing on the internet, while contributors Bob Mills, Ellie Taylor and Marek Larwood comment on what they see. Plus, a behind-the-scenes look at the supervirals that have taken the web by storm, such as toddler pals Ava and Leo, whose adorable canoodling racked up more than 120 million views, and Tiffany Sims the doughnut-pilfering three-year-old whose sassy backchat made her a YouTube star.(n)

programme.title: Babies 24/7: Maternity Ward
programme.desc: Second-time mum Catherine is induced at the hospital three weeks early, as she is suffering from a liver condition that makes her itch profusely.(n)

programme.title: 10 Years Younger in 10 Days
programme.desc: Cherry Healy and the experts help Sylvia, who wants to get rid of the scars left by skin cancer and reverse the effects of severe hair loss, and Graham, whose traumatic memories of his time in the Army has led to years of heavy smoking and neglect for his appearance.(n)

programme.title: Creed (2015)
programme.desc: The son of a heavyweight boxer who died in the ring seeks to follow in the footsteps of the father he never knew. He goes in search of his father's old rival-turned-best friend Rocky Balboa, who agrees to train the young fighter for a shot at the title - but the ageing champ is facing challenges of his own. Boxing drama, starring Michael B Jordan, with Sylvester Stallone reprising his role from the Rocky movies.(n)

programme.desc: The 40-something mums on a mission to grab middle age by the horns and rip up the ageing rule book, including former glamour girl and self-confessed attention seeker Jill, who is plotting the launch of an adult toy business. programme.desc: The doctor helps a patient who has modelled himself on a knight and lives by the ideals of the High Renaissance, and a relationship is reignited for Wilson. Medical drama, starring Hugh Laurie.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctors are baffled by a patient who leads an unorthodox life, and House puts Sam and Wilson's relationship to the test. Guest starring Sarah Wayne Callies (Prison Break).(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A Yorkshire landlord has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic take on an eviction case in Nottingham, where a landlord wants his property back after months of rent arrears and alleged anti-social behaviour - and find themselves confronted by a volatile tenant who insists he has the right to stay and refuses to back down. The duo also chase £5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Experienced enforcement agent Stewart and trainee Iain head to Blackpool to chase down a builder owing nearly £3,500 to an unhappy customer, while father and son Del and Dael are in Essex to collect over £2,500 owed to a frozen food company. In south London, Del and Brian attempt to recover nearly £10,000 from a debtor who acted as guarantor for a friend's rental agreement, ending in a bizarre stand-off with the debtor's daughter.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. Elsewhere, Delroy and Brian try to reclaim money a garage owes to a customer and are shocked by the condition of the vehicle in question, and a woman who has acted as guarantor for her sister's tenancy does not realise the extent of her responsibilities.(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The second of a two-part special of the programme that examines the lives of people on benefits, focusing on those who have large families. Tom and Stacey claim more than £70,000 a year from the state to support themselves and their 14 children, and run their household with military precision.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A campaign manager mysteriously falls ill with liver failure and temporary paralysis in the middle of a close election race, prompting the team to examine his political candidate to find clues about his condition. Cuddy forces House to hire a new female doctor, who is found to have a past connection to Taub.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Disease control official Dr Dave Broda closes down the hospital when a teenage girl thought to have contracted smallpox is admitted, but Masters becomes suspicious of his motives. Wilson and Sam comfort a six-year-old chemotherapy patient who prompts them to examine their relationship. Guest starring Dylan Baker (The Good Wife).(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: People featured in previous episodes, including an Essex landlady who wondered why her tenant had stopped paying rent - only to discover that the woman was in prison for GBH and that her ex-boyfriend had moved into the flat. Plus, a music entrepreneur who took his tenant to court after receiving no rent for seven months.(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: When a body is found in woodland 12 hours after an elderly couple are reported missing, residents in a rural village react with shock at the thought of a killer in their midst. Police and forensic teams worked fast and quickly made an arrest, but soon another name was in the frame, although the search for this new suspect would lead detectives far and wide. One question remained, however. Where was the second body?(n)

programme.title: Big Family Values: More Kids Than Cash
programme.desc: A family of 10 from Essex receive some troubling financial news and a home-schooling single mum of seven has to hold down two part-time jobs to make ends meet. Plus, the childhood sweethearts uprooting their seven kids for pastures new in a bid to save money.(n)

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Following his life-or-death missions in The Da Vinci Code, and Angels and Demons, long suffering expert Robert Langdon awakes with amnesia in an Italian hospital, and is soon on the run with a beautiful doctor. Racing to stop a devastating virus, the symbologist suffers shocking visions as an assassin closes in. Director Ron Howard's conversion of the Dan Brown thriller, starring Tom Hanks, Felicity Jones and Irrfan Khan.(n)

programme.desc: The medic's patience is tested by an ailing groom-to-be who harbours secrets from a previous relationship, leaving him wading through a list of possible conditions while the patient's fiancee digs for answers. programme.title: House
programme.desc: The cantankerous medic receives a visit at work from his therapist Dr Nolan. Medical drama starring Hugh Laurie, with Andre Braugher (Homicide: Life on the Street).(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Catching up with tenants and landlords from previous episodes, including a man living in a damp and mouldy flat, who was unable to sleep in the bedroom due to the horrendous conditions. The programme also revisits a 70-year-old landlady whose tenants stopped paying the rent for a year, and the council's Rogue Landlord Team in Lewisham, who learned where a slum property owner's reputation for a short fuse came from.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gary and Paul visit Kent to recover £2,500 owed by a publican to a utilities supplier - only to find themselves in the middle of a family at war. Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Elly uncovers a horrifying truth as she and Bea watch Finn's video diaries. Mackenzie reveals that her aunt will only allow her to stay in Erinsborough if the Rebecchis take her in.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Willow has second thoughts about leaving the Bay. Jasmine finds a visit to Tori about Robbo's will cathartic, as the two women bond over their loss and love of Robbo's daughter.(n)

programme.title: House

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl is killed in a building explosion, triggering an investigation that leads Green and Cassady to the property owner's ex-wife. Although they have no firm proof, McCoy pursues her in the courts - but Rubirosa finds a vital clue that leads the case in another direction.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady look into the murder of Carl Mullaly, who had recently been profiled on HardFocus, a magazine programme that identifies sex offenders. The only witness is an eight-year-old girl and detectives soon make an arrest, but learn the tabloid talk show may have been more involved than it initially appeared.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team discovers a former fingerprint examiner may have provided false testimony to help the prosecution in several court cases. To make matters worse, it transpires that Van Buren earned her promotion thanks to two of these fraudulent convictions. Award-winning police drama, starring S Epatha Merkerson.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A naval commander's body is washed ashore along with the bullet-riddled corpses of two drug traffickers, suggesting he was involved in illicit activities. Gibbs refuses to believe the worst and tries to prove the man's innocence by finding whoever else was involved in the shoot-out. Guest starring Emilie de Ravin (Lost).(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates a role-playing game believed to have caused the death of a sailor who was found at the bottom of the sea in his dress whites. Discovering the dead man was a compulsive player, Gibbs and the crew try to find out how far he would have gone to exact revenge on his arch-enemy, another seaman. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady investigate an arson attack on a church - but the discovery of a man's body among the charred ruins, obviously killed before the blaze was started, turns the case into a murder inquiry. The victim later proves to have been a school tutor - who may have been murdered for teaching the theory of evolution.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady investigate the fatal shooting of female rapper Clarice James. The clues initially lead them to a shady music producer, but suspicion later falls on a jeweller who claims the victim owed him a large sum of money. Police drama, starring Milena Govich and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy lieutenant's mummified body is found 10 years after his disappearance, prompting renewed interest in the case. Declared a deserter, he was given a dishonourable discharge - chiefly because $1million went missing from his ship's safe on the day he vanished. Drama, starring Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs, Tony and Kate board an aircraft carrier to investigate the deaths of two crewmen who appear to have overdosed, even though the pair had no history of drug use. At first the inquiry seems doomed to failure - until training tapes offer an unlikely lead. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly.(n)

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women's prison, leaving Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A famous news reporter is raped by two men but fails to prove their guilt at the trial, and decides to challenge the cops' competence with a TV debate, only to be killed by a bomb blast. With one of her previous attackers cleared of the murder, it's up to the police to find his accomplice - and it becomes apparent the journalist is not the only victim in the puzzling case.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler try to secure a conviction against a piano teacher accused of molesting his students _ but the prime witness refuses to testify, afraid that a video of his ordeal will emerge. The detectives' difficulties are compounded by the discovery of other tapes that could compromise their case and cause further heartache. Christopher Meloni stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler suspects Benson may be in danger during an investigation into a stalker the officers believe to be responsible for the murder of an assistant district attorney. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An investment analyst is found hanged from her four-poster bed, her body covered in piercings, cuts and bruises, leading the police to conclude her death occurred during a kinky sex session. The discovery of a whip containing half a million dollars in cash intrigues the officers further - but they face the task of tracking down the woman's partner to solve the mystery. Crime drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: Keaton and the CoIntel team must locate a domestic target before Chigorin launches an all-out assault on unsuspecting innocents.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Burgess encourages her sister to spend a night out with friends, but when it turns out Nicole never made it home, she is found in a railway station - a victim of sexual assault.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: If a Body Meet a Body
programme.desc: Jessica attends the funeral of an old friend, whose former lover interrupts the service to insist he did not die of a heart attack, as the medical examiner's report claims, but was actually murdered. When the corpse is found to have been misidentified and a large sum of investment money goes missing from the town, the sleuth agrees that something far more complex is going on. Starring Angela Lansbury, Tom Bosley, Carrie Snodgress and Audrey Landers.(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Political Operation
programme.desc: Jake and Laura are put on security detail for a forward-thinking Cuban politician, whose visit to the United States leads to the tragic death of his protector.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a female jogger is found in a park, and detectives Briscoe and Green discover she was mauled to death by a pit-bull terrier. The race is on to trace the animal and its owner before another tragedy occurs - and the team is shocked to discover a warehouse where dogs are trained for illegal fighting. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The CEO of a military equipment contractor is murdered, leading Cassady and Green to initially suspect anti-war protesters. The victim's widow later receives a Purple Heart medal, linking the act to the killing of a soldier in Iraq, which prompts the detectives to track down the dead serviceman's former comrades. Guest starring Titus Welliver (The Good Wife), with Milena Govich.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An actor wearing blood-stained clothing is arrested for drink-driving, and makes his situation worse by embarking on a racist speech. Green and Cassady are left to uncover whether a murder has taken place, discovering that the executive producer of his former TV show has been found dead in Harlem - but realise the star may be covering for his son. Crime drama, guest starring Chevy Chase.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to identify the charred remains of a woman caught in an apartment block fire, which was started deliberately. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy lieutenant's mummified body is found 10 years after his disappearance, prompting renewed interest in the case. Declared a deserter, he was given a dishonourable discharge - chiefly because $1million went missing from his ship's safe on the day he vanished. Drama, starring Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs, Tony and Kate board an aircraft carrier to investigate the deaths of two crewmen who appear to have overdosed, even though the pair had no history of drug use. At first the inquiry seems doomed to failure - until training tapes offer an unlikely lead. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant dies of ricin poisoning and the detectives' inquiries link him and his brother to a prostitution ring trafficking young women into New York. A police officer whose daughter was among the girls is the main suspect, but Green and Cassady face difficulties with the Russian consulate.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the abduction and murder of a child, following a lead to a suspected serial paedophile, who is found holding another boy captive. However, the youngster seems to be more than just an innocent victim. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The partially dissolved body of a submariner is discovered in a tub of acid at a Navy base - but Gibbs discovers no crew members have been reported missing and deduces an imposter has assumed the dead man's identity. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The investigators head for Cuba to look into the mysterious death of a Navy translator stationed at Guantanamo Bay. Discovering a terrorist is plotting to kill one of his own accomplices, they try to thwart the plan before tragedy occurs. Starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team is caught in a contentious political battle as public protests over the recent hate crime turn violent.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A street vendor informs officers he has reason to believe a Romanian immigrant who visits his stall is the victim of serious sexual assault at the hands of her employer. He reveals she left the name of another Romanian, who the investigators subsequently discover could be her aunt - but soon after they visit the presumed relative, she winds up dead. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A fire at the side of the road prompts Stabler to pull over and assist the emergency services. He is horrified to discover the murder of a man who was set on fire - and his daughter Maureen sees everything. Christopher Meloni and Erin Broderick star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman who claims she has been raped turns to the Unit for help, but the team cannot get enough evidence against the prime suspect and is forced to drop the case. However, another victim comes forward six months later with a similar story, making them believe they have made a terrible mistake. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson get mixed up in the murky world of politics after a coalition leader's gay son is found murdered on the roof of his apartment. The finger of suspicion points to a notorious rapist, who has just been released from prison on parole, but he insists he didn't commit the crime - so further DNA tests are used to shed light on the death. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: A teenage boy is shot dead, and when the gun is recovered it turns out to be the same one used in a case from 17 years earlier - meaning Voight put away an innocent man.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Intelligence investigate an armed bank heist, which leads them to a teenage gang run by an older Fagin-like criminal. A second incident ends in tragedy for Lindsay and another detective from the robbery-homicide division tries to take over the investigation.(n)

programme.desc: Jessica is upset when she learns that a short story of hers will appear in a magazine that has become known for its racy pictures of young women. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an alleyway, and the detectives discover he shined shoes for a living. They begin by looking for his most recent customers, and learn the victim was a Vietnam war veteran, shedding light on possible motives and suspects.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady investigate the death of corporate attorney Charles Dillon, whose body was found in a hotel room, and discover the company he was working for was in the process of being indicted. Their inquiry leads them to the female CEO and her relationship with a prostitute. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man's death offers no immediate explanation, until the autopsy points Green and Cassady in the direction of illegally harvested donor bones, which the dead man had received in a transplant. However, McCoy and Rubirosa struggle to bring the case to prosecution when it becomes clear they can only get the necessary evidence by testing another transplant recipient.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Southerlyn battle the lawyers over the fatal shooting of an uninvited nightclub guest who was seen confronting popular rap star Darry 'G-Trane' moments before the murder. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Elisabeth Rohm.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The partially dissolved body of a submariner is discovered in a tub of acid at a Navy base - but Gibbs discovers no crew members have been reported missing and deduces an imposter has assumed the dead man's identity. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander.(n)

Discovering a terrorist is plotting to kill one of his own accomplices, they try to thwart the plan before tragedy occurs. Starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The deaths of two homeless men within a day of each other prompts Green and Cassady to investigate a possible connection between the cases. They discover one of the victims got into a fight with a fellow Iraq War veteran, and McCoy reveals the crime could be related to the deplorable conditions the perpetrator was subjected to at an army hospital. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The ex-wife of a respected former senator is found murdered in her home, and Green and Cassady's inquiries lead them to a dysfunctional family with a number of strange secrets. In court, McCoy grows frustrated when he must argue the case in front of a judge seemingly more interested in public relations than justice.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is forced to exhume the body of a marine in a bid to ascertain whether a phone call to his widow, allegedly from beyond the grave, was a malicious hoax or evidence that he is still alive. Naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is buried alive, but manages to claw her way out of the grave. The only thing she remembers is that someone has planted a bomb on board a Navy ship - but in the process of trying to learn her identity, the team discovers things are not as they seem. Sherilyn Fenn (Twin Peaks) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Ransom
programme.desc: The FBI call on Eric's help to convince the survivor of an internet predator to reveal who is inciting vulnerable people to harm themselves.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the beating and rape of an Afghan woman in Central Park. As it probes the violent and disturbing case, the victim's family turn their backs on her. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rapist Kenneth Cleary strikes again, and the detectives must race against the clock to ensure their efforts to catch the criminal succeed. However, the suspect's wife provides him with an airtight alibi, and Harper's obsession with the case puts the investigation in jeopardy.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a promiscuous millionaire, and soon discover he had a tangled private life, involving a string of lovers and an angry wife. A team of scheming, sultry Russian gold-diggers could hold essential clues to the killing. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.desc: Jenni Falconer helps a couple looking for an idyllic property in Sicily.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts examine properties up for auction, including a 100-year-old barn in Devon and three-bedroom homes in London and Lincolnshire. They follow the sales and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings, returning to review their progress a few months later.(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore properties in Northern Ireland and southern England, including a flat, a Victorian house with seven separate rental rooms and a 1960s terraced home. After they are sold at auction, Lucy and Martin speak to the new owners about their plans for the buildings.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.sub-title: DIY SOS at Great Ormond Street Hospital
programme.desc: The DIY SOS team are out of their comfort zone this week, joining forces with two world-famous institutions - Great Ormond Street Hospital and the Chelsea Flower Show - for a special challenge. Gardener Chris Beardshaw has promised his gold medal-winning garden from the flower show to the hospital - now all Nick Knowles and his fellow builders have to do is crane the display across London and rebuild it on the hospital. It's a hugely ambitious build, with tricky logistics and emotional volunteers. But knowing how much the garden will prove welcome respite for families, the team is determined not to fail.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.sub-title: Million Pound Build for Children in Need
programme.desc: DIY SOS highlights the plight of nation's 250,000 young carers, who look after their parents on a daily basis. Blackpool Carers Trust, which is supported by funding from Children in Need, provides limited out-of-school respite and training activities for some of these carers - but its current centre is bursting at the seams. It has now inherited a run-down property, which is bigger but will require the renovation of a neglected building and a huge overgrown garden - and that's where Nick and the team come in, with help from designer Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles, his team and a group of volunteers are in Monmouth, Wales, to transform the family home of Charlotte, a mother recovering from a stroke that left her with brain damage, speech loss and partial paralysis. The current layout of her home makes it difficult for Charlotte to move around and have her physiotherapy treatment, so the team redesign the house to make things easier for her, her husband Rob and their children.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to the Isle of Sheppey in Kent to meet two extraordinary dads, Garry and Kyle, who have adopted four vulnerable children - three of whom have special needs - to give them the best life possible. But their cramped three-bedroom bungalow is making family life difficult. So to give this family the space they so desperately need, the DIY SOS builders are undertaking their most ambitious project yet - to demolish the bungalow and build a bespoke five-bedroom house in its place. But with just nine days to complete the task, it looks like being their toughest one yet.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets midwife and kidney patient Sascha, who has to undergo intense dialysis sessions for hours on end, five days a week. This places the mother-of-four's body under great stress and the constant threat of blood clots gives her a life expectancy of just a few years. Determined to help, the DIY SOS team, bolstered by the local tradespeople and volunteers of Welwyn Garden City, renovate her home to include a dedicated dialysis room, offering her the chance of many more years with her family.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team return to Veterans Street in Manchester, where, two years ago, with the help of Prince William and Prince Harry, DIY SOS launched their most ambitious project yet - transforming a derelict street into a vibrant community for veterans and local people. This time they build the final home for decorated former soldier and single dad Simon Flores, whose foot was blown off by a roadside bomb during a patrol in Iraq.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of extreme cleaners. In London, sisters Yvonne and Angela tackle the dirtiest flat they have ever encountered in nearly 20 years on the job, while Maxine and her daughter Jasmine deal with a hoarder who has 20 years' worth of possessions cluttering his home. In Somerset, Shaun and his team specialise in full house clearances and hey are sorting out a flat for a landlord, but the resident appears not to have thrown anything away in years and rotting household rubbish almost fills the rooms.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Shaun and his team are called out by a landlady who found her property in a very bad state, with mess over the floors, graffiti on the walls and doors pulled off their hinges. Maxine and her daughter Jasmine encounter a mountain of cigarette butts while cleaning the house of a man whose life fell apart following the breakup of his marriage, while sisters Yvonne and Angela tackle a bedsit with an infestation of German cockroaches.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Cameras follow mother and daughter Maxine and Jasmine as they face one of their biggest hoarder jobs yet - an elderly man who has a bungalow packed with 30 years' worth of belongings. Meanwhile, George and his team face a difficult clean up after a body was discovered in a flat.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Maxine and Jasmine help a man who is caring for his elderly father, with the family home featuring kitchen floorboards that have years' worth of dirt ingrained and carpets that are threadbare and filthy. Yvonne and Angela have their work cut out with the worst toilet they have ever encountered in a one-day clean of a caravan.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Yvonne and Angela help an artist whose nine-bedroom house in Stafford is overrun with clutter, and Maxine and Jasmine go to Clacton to a maisonette that is covered in years' worth of animal fur from their 16 pets, and have three days to get it back into shape.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Return of the documentary following extreme cleaners. Sisters Yvonne and Angela tackle a hoarder's house in Southend that is so bad the lady has been sleeping in the shed for the past six years. Plus, father-and-son team Steve and Jamie rid a drugs den of dirty needles in Newport, south Wales.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: In Wales, sisters Yvonne and Angela are called to a large house which was abandoned after its young owner had been struggling to cope. And in Stevenage, mum and daughter cleaning team Maxine and Jasmine tackle a house that was - until recently - home to 12 cats.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Mother and daughter cleaning team Maxine and Jasmine take on a house filled with 30 years' worth of arts and crafts materials. Yvonne and Angela tackle a flat covered in rubbish and dog mess, and ex-Army man Steve faces a shocking toilet that even he can't clean.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Maxine and Jasmine help a Dover lady who has been struggling to clean since becoming a full-time carer for her wheelchair-bound husband. In Tamworth, sisters Yvonne and Angela tackle a two-bed house for a man facing eviction because he hasn't cleaned in nearly three decades.(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: In Glasgow, Steve and Jamie are called to the home of a man who has been struggling since the deaths of both his partner and his best friend only a few years ago. programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Vernon Kay hosts a celebrity version of the classic game show, in which he invites well-known faces and their clans to win £30,000 for charity. Radio 1 DJ Chris Moyles plays for the Robert Ogden Centre and the Iain Rennie Hospice at Home, while presenter Fearne Cotton aims to win big for Macmillan Cancer Support.(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Vernon Kay hosts another celebrity edition of the classic game show, in which he invites well-known faces to team up with their relatives in a bid to win a prize of up to £30,000 for charity. Actor Nicola Stapleton joins her clan to play for Cancer Research, while comedian Johnny Vegas and his family aim to win big for the Willowbrook Hospice.(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Vernon Kay invites another celebrity pair to team up with their relatives in a bid to win a prize of up to £30,000 for charity. Radio 1 DJ Sara Cox and her brood play for Macmillan Cancer Support and Magic Breakfast, while singer Jimmy Osmond brings his family along to raise money for the LDS Humanitarian Relief Fund.(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Vernon Kay invites another pair of famous faces to team up with their relatives and play the classic game show, in a bid to win a prize of up to £30,000 for charity. Chef Jean-Christophe Novelli and his brood aim to win for SOS Children's Village and Chase Children's Hospice, Guildford, while antiques expert David Dickinson brings his family along to raise funds for St Ann's Hospice, Cheshire.(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Vernon Kay invites another pair of well-known faces to play the classic game show in a bid to win a prize of up to £30,000 for charity. Former Blue singer Lee Ryan brings his clan along to raise funds for the Elton John Aids Foundation, while model Melinda Messenger's brood aim to win big for ActionAid.(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Vernon Kay invites another pair of famous faces to play the classic game show in a bid to win up to £30,000 for charity. Sports presenter Gabby Logan and her clan aim to earn cash for Chase Children's Hospice in Guildford, while former England goalkeeper David Seaman brings his brood along to raise money for the Bobby Moore Fund for Cancer Research.(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Vernon Kay invites another pair of famous faces to play the classic game show in a bid to win up to £30,000 for charity. Olympian Kelly Holmes and her clan aim to earn cash for Breast Cancer Haven, while cricketer and former King of the Jungle Phil Tufnell brings his brood along to raise money for the Samantha Dixon Brain Tumour Trust.(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Vernon Kay invites cast members from two soap families to play the classic game show in a bid to win up to £30,000 for a charity of their choice. Coronation Street's Bruce Jones (Les Battersby-Brown) teams up with screen wife Wendi Peters (Cilla), Andrew Whyment (lodger Kirk Sutherland), Samia Smith (Kirk's sister Maria) and Jayne Tunnicliffe (family friend Yana Lumb) to play for the Leukaemia Research Fund and the Leeds Upper GI Fund. Meanwhile, Emmerdale star Tony Audenshaw (Bob Hope) brings along his on-screen spouse Deena Payne (Viv), Verity Rushworth (stepdaughter Donna Windsor-Dingle), Alex Carter (son Jamie) and Adele Silva (Kelly Windsor), aiming to win big for the Variety Club of Great Britain and the Five Stars Scanner Appeal.(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Birds of a Feather actress Pauline Quirke takes part in the game show with broadcaster Jo Whiley. The pair team up with their families to guess the answers to surveys of 100 people in a bid to reach the final round, where they can win up to £30,000 for a charity of their choice. Vernon Kay hosts.(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as former Tory MP Edwina Currie, Countdown maths whizz Rachel Riley, Boyzone's Keith Duffy and Emmerdale's Mark Charnock (Marlon Dingle) pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for their chosen charities. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as comedian Jimmy Carr, Coronation Street's Jack P Shepherd (David Platt), retired rugby union player Matt Dawson and former Big Brother star Sally Bercow pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: TV presenter Dan Lobb, musical theatre star Jodie Prenger, wildlife expert Chris Packham and Coronation Street actress Jennie McAlpine (Fiz Stape) compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Presented by Bradley Walsh.(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Journalist Matthew Wright, TV presenter Suzi Perry, Ian 'H' Watkins from Steps and actress Crissy Rock (Benidorm) compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Presented by Bradley Walsh.(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Tenor Russell Watson, EastEnders star Rita Simons (Roxy Mitchell), wildlife presenter Bill Oddie and actress and broadcaster Denise Welch compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Former Blur bassist Alex James, ex-MP Ann Widdecombe, Radio 1 DJ Sara Cox and This Morning's Eamonn Holmes pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a large cash prize for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught. Bradley Walsh presents.(n)
